nasb.text: ‘Let me pass through your land, I will travel only on the highway; I will not turn aside to the right or to the left.

esv.text: ‘Let me pass through your land. I will go only by the road; I will turn aside neither to the right nor to the left.

cnv.text: ‘求你讓我從你的地經過；我只走大道，不偏左也不偏右。

ccb.text: ‘请允许我们从贵国经过，我们只走大路，不会偏离。
